messages.content: Please be an expert in SAPUI5 development. And answer my question with example codes that works.

I am an AI language model and I have knowledge and experience in SAPUI5 development. I will do my best to help you with your question. Please provide me with the specific details of your problem or topic you would like assistance with.

I am facing issue like when selecting the parent node all the child node which are targeting to respective parent node has to be selected automatically, and if the parent node is not expanded, also expand it. The control is sap.m.tree and the multiselection is on.

How it can possible ?
the selectedItem.getBindingContext() returns undeifiend.
parentItemPath get empty string since I have first selected one parent node, please fix the code for this situation.
what is tree in the code?

Apologies for the oversight. In the provided code snippets, `tree` represents the instance of the sap.m.Tree control object. 

When using the code in your application, you need to ensure that you have a reference to the sap.m.Tree control instance you are working with. You can either define the sap.m.Tree control in your XML view and fetch it using `sap.ui.getCore().byId("treeId")`, or if you are creating the sap.m.Tree programmatically, you can store the reference in a variable.

Here's an example of how you can define the sap.m.Tree control in the XML view and obtain its reference:

```xml
<mvc:View
  xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
  xmlns:m="sap.m"
>
  <m:Tree
    id="myTree"
    selectionChange="onSelectionChange"
    items="{
      path: '/Items',
      parameters: {
        arrayNames: ['nodes']
      }
    }"
  >
    <m:StandardTreeItem title="{title}" />
  </m:Tree>
</mvc:View>
```

And in the corresponding controller or JavaScript file:

```javascript
var tree = this.byId("myTree");

function onSelectionChange(event) {
  // Your event handling logic
}

tree.attachSelectionChange(onSelectionChange);
```

Ensure that the ID used in `this.byId("myTree")` matches the ID defined in the XML view.

Modify the code as per your application's structure and hierarchy. Let me know if you have any further questions!
got error: tree.isExpanded is not a function
got error: selectedItem.setExpanded
got error: tree.isExpanded is not a function and got error: tree.isExpanded is not a function
I don't have expanded property in my model
selectedItem.getNodes is not a function
